event: April — Fresco in Palazzo Schifanoia showing the Triumph of Venus
description: A large fresco divided into three horizontal registers. The top register shows a colorful courtly scene with elegantly dressed figures, musicians, lovers, and a central enthroned female figure on a chariot drawn by swans. The middle register contains dark zodiacal imagery with a bull (Taurus) and other astrological figures. The bottom register depicts scenes of daily life in a medieval Italian city — figures on horseback, merchants, and architecture, with some areas damaged and missing plaster. The overall palette is rich with greens, reds, golds, and earth tones.
